---
name: Curation request
about: Propose a new entity, reaction, or refinement to an existing reaction in the map
title: "curate(MX): <short description>"
labels: ["curation", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Source

- **PMID / DOI:**
- **Year:**
- **Study type:** (mechanistic / clinical trial / scRNAseq / bulk RNAseq / proteomic / review / other)
- **Species / model:** (human SSc skin / mouse bleomycin / fibroblast culture / endothelial culture / other)

## Claim

- **Module:** M1 (IFN-I) / M2 (TGF-β / fibrosis) / M3 (EndoMT / vasculopathy) / M4 (IL-6 / Th2 / B cell) / crosstalk
- **Entity A (upstream / regulator):** (HGNC symbol or UniProt accession)
- **Entity B (downstream / effector):** (HGNC symbol or UniProt accession)
- **Sign / type:** activation / inhibition / binding / state change / transcription / translocation / catalysis / other
- **Mechanism (if known):**
- **Compartment(s):**

## Evidence

Quote the supporting sentence(s) or figure caption from the paper. Indicate figure or table number.

> [paste here]

## MI2CAST pre-fill (optional but appreciated)

- **Biological role of participant A:**
- **Biological role of participant B:**
- **Evidence code (ECO):** (e.g. `ECO:0000314` direct assay, `ECO:0000353` physical interaction, `ECO:0000305` curator inference)
- **Taxonomy:** (NCBI taxon ID; default `9606` human)

## Notes for the curator

Anything else that would help: prior conflicting evidence, related reactions already in the map, suggested SBO term, suspected SSc-specific element.
